eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, MS; at 11:50 AM on JUL 21, 2026 Effective until 5:50 AM JUL 22, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: JCOES is updating its citizens on tropical storm Bertha. Prepare for TS Bertha by securing all moving or loose items on your property before tomorrow morning. Monitor weather conditions as necessary.
